description: The Shift Position node tells a IPlayable to move the current playback position upon impulse.

fields.* ([[Impulses|Call]]):
=== Target (IPlayable) ===

The IPlayable to set the position on.
fields.Delta: Set how much the position should be moved. A positive value moves the position forward, while a negative one moves it backwards.
fields.Next: Sends an impulse after the initial call.
